channel.title: Advice on Present day, present time.
channel.description: Recent content in Advice on Present day, present time.

item.title: Big Brother wears nanny clothes
item.description: The age verification systems on sites and apps is the total death of anonymity; Here's why

item.title: O Grande Irmão veste roupas de babá
item.description: Os sistemas de verificação de idade em sites e aplicativos são a morte total do anonimato; eis o porquê

item.title: Sign your letters, sign your data
item.description: A little write-up on my current view of the 'fake content' issue with social media

item.title: No, AI won't replace software engineers. Here is why
item.description: Since AI and LLMs, one of the main statements I've been reading is: 'AI will take programmers job'. Here is why I don't think that will happen.

item.title: your gallery probably sucks: here is an solution
item.description: Why your folder-based gallery sucks so much, and why you should use booru

item.title: Dados são o novo petróleo: e o governo quer os seus
item.description: Escrevendo sobre o tema de seus dados sendo roubados e espionados.

item.title: Data is the new oil: and the gov wants yours
item.description: Writing up on the subject of your data being stolen and spied on.

item.title: Stop Learning Slop on Programming and Do Something You Will Use
item.description: A small writeup on how most guides and coursers make students write bad code

item.title: Fuck your memory-safe language, write actual fucking code
item.description: You're focusing too much on the tool, and not on the outcome.
